rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 10, 2014 line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANT DORIS WONG APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER. DENIED. X-C failed to show by a preponderance of the evidence that the attachment should be issued. X-C has not shown that real estate investment occupies P's significant time, attention, and effort for the purposes of livelihood. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VADIM ROZENBAUM et al VS. KETEVAN TAPIA et al

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 10, 2014 line 2. D Fidelity National Title Insurance's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings. OFF CALENDAR per Notice of Withdrawal of Motion filed by the party on November 3, 2014. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES ENGELBERG VS. ELLEN TSANG, AS TRUSTEE OF THE ARZA TRUST et al

rulings.Case Title: SALVADOR DURAN et al VS. ANITA CONSUELO VILLAREAL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Archdiecese Of San Francisco'S Compliance With Deposition Dubpoena For Production Of Business Records
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 10, 2014 line 4. PLAINTIFFS SALVADOR DURAN, SERGIO DURAN, VALDEMAR DURAN'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Archdiecese Of San Francisco'S Compliance With Deposition Dubpoena For Production Of Business Records. rulings.Case Title: BRENDAN QUINLAN VS. JOHN PAXTON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Moiton For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 10, 2014 line 5. DEFENDANT JOHN PAXTON Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions. DENIED. Existing case law and the statutory language of Civil Code section 1717 objectively provided Plaintiff with enough support to make a good faith argument for extension of existing law in determining that Plaintiff is the prevailing party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 10, 2014 line 6. CROSS DEFENDANT VLAD COOD DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. CONTINUED to December 1, 2014. Moving party failed to attach a copy of the operative complaint to their motion. (See SF Local Rule 2.6C.) Courtesy copies must be dropped off in Dept. 501 by 4 p.m. on November 21, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al

rulings.Case Title: 1675 JERROLD AVENUE, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. JAMES BLOCHO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 10, 2014 line 9. DEFENDANT JAMES BLOCHO's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DENIED. Defendant had sufficient knowledge of the Complaint yet failed to file a timely Answer. Defendant failed to show that the delay was due to excusable neglect. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MISSION BAY HOUSING PARTNERS, LP VS. STEPHANIE A PULVIRENTI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 10, 2014 line 10. DEFENDANT STEPHANIE PULVIRENTI's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED to November 18, 2014. Moving party failed to attach provide the Court with courtesy copies. (See SF Local Rule 2.6B.) Courtesy copies must be dropped off in Dept. 501 by 4 p.m. on November 13, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO VS. ALBERTO ARAMBULA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 10, 2014 line 11. DEFENDANT SANTOS DZIB's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiff has failed to allege sufficient facts evidencing compliance with or exemption from San Francisco Rent Stabilization and Arbitration Ordinance. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES INC VS. ROBERT LANGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 10, 2014 line 12. DEFENDANT ROBERT LANGE's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DENIED. Defendant has not made a sufficient showing that his failure to file a timely response to the FAC was a result of mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect. (See CCP 473(b).) = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK A. BENSON ET AL VS. ROY C. ADAMS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 10, 2014 line 13. PLAINTIFFS MARK BENSON, CARL STOLOSKI, STEPHANIE STOLOSKI, ADELINE STOLOSKI, JAMES SWEEENEY and PATRICIA SWEENEY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion OFF CALENDAR since parties have settled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN TORMA VS. EVAN KOPELSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 10, 2014 line 14. DEFENDANT EVAN KOPELSON's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED. Defendant made a sufficient showing of inadvertence and excusable neglect and diligence in making the motion soon after discovery of default. = (501/REQ)
